3140190.name: God, Save the Queens!
3140190.description:
GOD, SAVE THE QUEENS!

God, Save the Queens! is a 2.5D wave-based roguelike where you are God who came down to rescue the five daughters of the King of Provia from the lunatic wizard Zaharad and his army of evil. Kill thousands of enemies, upgrade your skills, unlock new weapons, and save the queens!

Features

  • 5 Empires, 5 Queens! - You are destined to rescue the five kidnapped daughters of the King! You start your journey in the conquered Provia kingdom, where Arthur III (the King), your good old friend, summoned you.

  • Wave-based Combat - Thousands of enemies are waiting for your blade!

  • Vengeful Bosses - You will often have to fight the bigger ones...

  • Permanent Skills - Each skill grants you a useful ability for the current run! Unlock up to 10 skills in a single run.

  • Useful Consumables - Consumables are single-use items dropped from defeated enemies. Use them to boost yourself and your allies for a limited time.

  • Deadly Weapons - Fight your enemies with up to 5 weapons at the same time!

  • Natural Events - Strong winds, rockfalls, thunderstorms, and more!

  • Level Up Your God! - Gain XP from enemies and completed objectives. Use your XP to level up and become the most powerful lord of the universe!

  • Hundreds of Collectibles - Grow your collection of unique weapons, skills, consumables, and enemies!

  • Save Anytime! - The game automatically saves your progress when you quit or stop playing.

  • Rich Accessibility - Customize your in-game experience according to your own preferences: damage numbers, camera smoothness, UI, FOV, and more!
3140190.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 匈牙利语, 日语, 韩语, 俄语, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
